prompt_md: Match each **model trait** on the left to its correct **practical implication** on the right.

right: Supply recent or private facts in the prompt; the model won't know them on its own
Add a verification step for outputs that touch facts, since confident text can be wrong
Don't rely on exact-string equality in tests; the same prompt may vary run to run
Use it when you need focused, repeatable output such as structured or code responses
Reserve it for genuinely hard reasoning; expect higher cost and latency per call
